jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Piramal Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Piramal Pharma in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Piramal Pharma:
Piramal Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Pharma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
